project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Decision made to mill while injecting water. Milled 1856ft - 1910ft, over ~12 hour period, then POOH, laid down lubricator and mast due to expected high wind speed. Ops on standby pending winds, expected to come down early tomorrow am. Timing for MFC logging TBC.

project: PRJ03335 - Perenco - Wytch Farm - F-22 - MFC
comment: Job completed. Equipment ready to be backloaded to Aberdeen. Pending cleaning of the equipment, Also pending finish all paperwork, and pending London- Denmark Ticket. MH Leaving site 22:20
